name: Seasonic PRIME TX ATX 3.0 1600W Fully Modular Power Supply - 80 PLUS Titanium Certified - Intel ATX 12 V - 2x 16-Pin PCIe 5.0 12VHPWR Cables - 135mm FDB Fan with Digital Hybrid Fan Control - 6x PCI-E 6+2-Pin Connectors (SSR-1600TR2)
